decisions.name: Check_if_INTL_Phone_Number_entered
decisions.label: Check if INTL Phone Number entered

decisions.name: Check_if_Regen_INTL_Phone_Number_entered
decisions.label: Check if Regen INTL Phone Number entered

decisions.name: Check_if_Shift_has_been_approved
decisions.label: Check if Shift has been approved

decisions.description: Check if Shift is not too early or late to Approve OR hasn't been cancelled.
decisions.name: Check_if_Shift_is_allowed_to_be_approved
decisions.label: Check if Shift is allowed to be approved

decisions.name: Check_if_Start_End_Time_Populated
decisions.label: Check if Start & End Time Populated

decisions.description: This Decision is for checking what type of site you have selected weather it is generic or correct site.
decisions.name: Check_Site_in_Not_Blank_in_the_Screen
decisions.label: Check Site in Not Blank in the Screen

decisions.name: Check_Temp_PIN_and_OR_Sig_Valid
decisions.label: Check Temp PIN and OR Sig Valid

rules.name: Temp_PIN_NOT_Found_OR_Expiried
rules.label: Temp PIN NOT Found OR Expiried

rules.name: Does_Approver_need_a_PIN_Number
rules.label: Does Approver need a PIN Number

decisions.name: Only_Update_Doc_ID_if_NULL
decisions.label: Only Update Doc ID if NULL

rules.name: Client_Contact_Found_but_Temp_Approved
rules.label: Client Contact Found but Temp Approved

decisions.name: Temp_only_Update_Doc_Id_if_Null
decisions.label: Temp only Update Doc If iD Null

rules.name: Do_we_need_to_Regen_PIN
rules.label: Do we need to Regen PIN

Flow.description: Shift has been cancelled screen wording change.

formulas.name: SMSBody
formulas.expression: "Alliance Connect - Here is your new temporary PIN. This will expire in 24 hours. " + {!FormattedTempPinNumber}

Flow.label: 1218 - Shift Approval PIN Manager Ver 2

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager6
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: CandidateOwnNumberScreen
fields.fieldText:
You cannot use the same mobile number as the candidate allocated to this shift.


Please enter the mobile number of the approver.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager11
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ConfirmClientContactText
fields.fieldText:
We need to confirm that you're registered to approve this shift.


According to our records, the registered approver for: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Site__r.Name} in our system is {!Get_Client_Contact_Records.FirstName} {!Get_Client_Contact_Records.LastName}﻿.

fields.name: ClientContactConfirmationCheckbox
fields.fieldText: I confirm I am {!Get_Client_Contact_Records.FirstName} {!Get_Client_Contact_Records.LastName}﻿.

fields.name: ConfirmClientCandidateTxt2
fields.fieldText: If you're not the registered approver, leave the box blank and press Next.

fields.name: Shift_Already_Approved6
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: Copy_1_of_TempPINGeneration
fields.fieldText: Temporary PIN not found

fields.name: NoApproverText2
fields.fieldText: We couldn't find a Temporary PIN linked to your detail, please press Continue to generate a new Temporary PIN.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_NoApproverText
fields.fieldText:
A new PIN will be generated. It will last 24 hours.


Please confirm your name and mobile number.

fields.name: Regen_Temp_Approver_First_Name
fields.fieldText: First name

fields.name: Regen_Temp_Approver_Last_Name
fields.fieldText: Last name

fields.name: Regen_TempPIN_Phone_Number
fields.fieldText: Mobile number

fields.name: InternationPhoneInvalid
fields.fieldText: The mobile number is invalid. Please try again. e.g +61412345678 or 0412345678.

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText: You are not allowed to update Actual Start/End Time or Break fields.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager5
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: TempPINGeneration
fields.fieldText: Temporary PIN confirmation

fields.name: NoApproverText
fields.fieldText: Please enter your approver details and we'll check if a Temporary PIN already exists.

fields.name: Temp_Approver_First_Name
fields.fieldText: First name

fields.name: Temp_Approver_Last_Name
fields.fieldText: Last name

fields.name: TempPIN_Phone_Number
fields.fieldText: Mobile number

fields.name: PhoneLengthError
fields.fieldText: The phone number is invalid. Please try again. e.g +61412345678 or 0412345678.

fields.name: ErrorSelectedSiteIsGeneric
fields.fieldText: Shift cannot be approved with a generic site, please select a specific site you were allocated to.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager13
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ApprvoerMaxPINCount
fields.fieldText:
You have entered an incorrect PIN too many times.


Please contact your Branch for assistance.

fields.name: Screen_Shift_Too_Early_Error_Header
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ShiftTooEarlyMessage
fields.fieldText:
You're trying to Approve a Shift 15 minutes before the Scheduled Start Date.


Please wait for the shift to Start before trying again.

fields.name: Screen_Shift_Too_Late_Header
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ShiftTooLateMessage
fields.fieldText:
Shifts cannot be approved more than 4 weeks after the scheduled end time.


Please reach out to your local branch for assistance.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager2
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: InitialMessage
fields.fieldText:
Please check that start time, end time and site are correct.


N.B. Please ensure you enter the correct times, any fraudulent behaviours will be legally handled.

fields.name: Selected_Site_Picklist
fields.fieldText: Site worked

fields.name: Site_not_found_in_the_list
fields.fieldText: Site not found in the list
fields.helpText: If your site is not listed, check the box and enter your site name in the text field.

fields.name: Enter_the_site_name_here
fields.fieldText: Enter the site name here

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ShiftApprovedMessage
fields.fieldText:
Welcome to the Shift Approval Manager.


The Shift {!Get_Shift.Name} for candidate {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Contact__r.FirstName} {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Contact__r.LastName} has already been approved.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager12
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: PINNumberEntryHeading
fields.fieldText: PIN

fields.name: ScreenTxt
fields.fieldText: To approve this shift {!Get_Shift.Name}, enter your 4-digit PIN:

fields.name: Pin_Number_Entry
fields.fieldText: PIN

fields.name: PINError
fields.fieldText: The PIN you entered is not valid. Please try again.

fields.name: Re_generate_PIN_Number
fields.fieldText: I've forgotten my PIN.

fields.name: SignatureHeading
fields.fieldText: Signature

fields.name: SignatureText
fields.fieldText: To confirm approval for shift {!Get_Shift.Name}, please provide your signature and press Upload and Save.

fields.name: SigErrorText
fields.fieldText: A signature is required to confirm your approval for this shift. Please sign below and press Upload and Save.

fields.name: SignatureCaptured
fields.fieldText: Your signature has been successfully uploaded.

fields.name: SigCaptureMessge
fields.fieldText: Your signature has been successfully uploaded.

fields.name: TSApprover_RegenConfirmation
fields.fieldText: A new PIN will be sent to [{!Get_Client_Contact_Records.Email}].

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager14
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ScreenTxt1
fields.fieldText:
This Shift is ready to be approved. Please confirm the details and click Approve.


{!Get_Shift.Name} for {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Contact__r.FirstName} {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Contact__r.LastName}.


Site: {!Selected_Site_Picklist}

Job type: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name}

Actual start time: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}

Actual end time: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Shift_Approval_Manager14
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: Copy_1_of_ScreenTxt1
fields.fieldText:
The shift has now been approved.


Press the back arrow on the top left corner to return to the shift view.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Screen_Shift_Too_Early_Error_Header
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: Copy_1_of_ShiftTooEarlyMessage
fields.fieldText:
This shift has been cancelled and cannot be approved.


If you believe this is an error, please contact your local branch.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager8
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: ApproverMsg
fields.fieldText: Please enter your full name and position.

fields.name: Approver_Full_Name
fields.fieldText: Approver full name

fields.name: Approver_Position
fields.fieldText: Approver position

fields.name: TempPINNumberEntryHeading
fields.fieldText: Temporary PIN

fields.name: TempScreenTxt
fields.fieldText: To approve this shift {!Get_Shift.Name}, enter your 4-digit PIN below.

fields.name: Temp_Pin_Number_Entry
fields.fieldText: PIN

fields.name: TempPINReqError
fields.fieldText: A PIN is required to approve this shift. Please try again.

fields.name: TempPINError
fields.fieldText: The PIN you entered is not valid. Please try again.

fields.name: Rengenerate_PIN_Number_Checkbox
fields.fieldText: I've forgotten my PIN.

fields.name: TempSignatureHeading
fields.fieldText: Signature

fields.name: TempSignatureText
fields.fieldText: To confirm approval for shift {!Get_Shift.Name}, please provide your signature and press Upload and Save.

fields.name: TempSigErrorText
fields.fieldText: A signature is required to confirm your approval for this shift. Please sign below and press Upload and Save.

fields.name: TempSigCapSuccess
fields.fieldText: Your signature has been successfully uploaded.

fields.name: TempSigCaptureMessge
fields.fieldText: Your signature has been successfully uploaded.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager9
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: TempPinAttemptsMsg
fields.fieldText:
You have entered an incorrect PIN too many times.


Please contact your Branch for assistance.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager7
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager﻿

fields.name: Debug2
fields.fieldText:
A new temporary PIN has been sent to {!VarRegenPINPhoneNumber}. Once you receive the temporary PIN, press Continue.


If there's a delay receiving your PIN, wait for the PIN and then restart the process.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager4
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: WelcomeText
fields.fieldText:
Welcome to the Alliance Connect Timesheet Approval Manager.

You are about to approve {!Get_Shift.Name} for {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Contact__r.FirstName} {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Contact__r.LastName}.

fields.name: Text2
fields.fieldText:
Site: {!Selected_Site_Picklist}

Job type: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Team__r.sirenum__Job_Type__r.Name}

Scheduled start time: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c}

Scheduled end time: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c}

fields.name: WelcomeScreen_ActualTimes
fields.fieldText:
Actual start time: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c}

Actual end time: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c}

fields.name: WelcomeScreen_1stMealBreak
fields.fieldText:
1st meal break: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Break_Length__c} minutes

1st meal break start time: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__BreakStartTime__c}

fields.name: WelcomeScreen_1stMealBreakLengthChanged
fields.fieldText: Meal break length has been changed.﻿

fields.name: WelcomeScreen_2ndMealBreak
fields.fieldText:
2nd meal break: {!Get_Shift.tc9_ext_sirint__Second_Break_Length__c} minutes

2nd meal break start time: {!Get_Shift.tc9_ext_sirint__Second_Break_Start_Time__c}

fields.name: WelcomeScreen_2ndMealBreakAdded
fields.fieldText: Second meal break has been added.

fields.name: AllowancesText
fields.fieldText: Please review claimed allowances.

fields.name: Spacer2
fields.fieldText: Click the checkbox if you approve.

fields.name: ApproveAllowancesCheck
fields.fieldText: I approve these allowances.

validationRule.errorMessage: Please approve Claimed allowances or return to Allowances to remove the claim.

fields.name: WelcomeScreen_Confirmation
fields.fieldText: If all the details above are correct, please press Continue.

fields.name: Shift_Approval_Manager10
fields.fieldText: Shift approval manager

fields.name: PINExpired
fields.fieldText:
Your PIN has been reset.


A new PIN has been emailed to you. Once you've received it, you can restart the approval process.

textTemplates.name: NewPINEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Your PIN number has been refreshed as it expired.


You new PIN Number is


{!FormattedPinNumber}
